intro: Lissochilus bellus, also known as the "beautiful orchid," is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family, characterized by its vibrant purple flowers and delicate, green leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its reported health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Lissochilus bellus include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
